meta.name: JSON Toolbox MCP
meta.description: Premium MCP server for JSON manipulation

positioning.persona: Backend and integration developers using AI coding assistants who frequently wrangle JSON payloads from APIs, configs, and logs
positioning.valueProp: A dedicated MCP server that gives your AI assistant reliable, deterministic JSON manipulation primitives instead of error-prone freehand parsing.
positioning.usp: Purpose-built JSON toolbox exposed via MCP — unlike generic shell or filesystem servers, every tool is typed, schema-aware, and optimized for round-tripping large JSON without token bloat.
topUseCases: Validating and pretty-printing JSON responses inside an AI chat workflow
Diffing, merging, and patching configuration files across environments
Querying and transforming large JSON payloads without loading them into the model context

pricing.rationale: Trivial JSON utility tools (ping/echo) provide no premium value or hosted infrastructure cost justifying paid tiers.

copy.tagline: Premium MCP server for JSON manipulation
copy.shortDesc: Premium MCP server for JSON manipulation
copy.longDesc: Premium MCP server for JSON manipulation
